overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto IV showing a character walking along the Liberty City waterfront promenade at dusk. The character approaches a fisherman, watches a colorful sailboat pass by on the water, and continues along the illuminated skyline with the Queensway Bridge visible in the background.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade toward a fisherman standing by the railing

notable_agents.action: fishing by the railing, casting line into the water

entered.detail: silver metal safety railing along the waterfront edge
dual recycling bins on the concrete promenade
illuminated modern skyscrapers across the water reflecting sunset colors
calm river water with orange and purple sunset reflections

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete waterfront promenade at dusk, approaching a fisherman standing by the metal railing. The city skyline glows across the water with warm sunset colors, and dual trash cans sit on the left side of the path.

events.description: colorful sailboat with yellow and red sails enters from the right, sailing on the water
flock of birds flies overhead across the dusky sky

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk alongside the fisherman, observing the sailboat passing by

notable_agents.action: fishing by the railing, holding rod over the water

entered.detail: small sailboat with distinctive yellow and red sails moving across the water
large steel truss bridge spanning the river in the distance

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a colorful sailboat with yellow and red sails glides past on the water from right to left. A large steel truss bridge becomes visible in the distance on the right, and birds fly overhead against the purple and orange sky while the fisherman remains by the railing.

events.description: character moves toward the railing, allowing camera to pass or overtake
camera moves past the character, revealing the promenade ahead with distant pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking past the fisherman and continuing along the promenade before moving aside

notable_agents.action: fishing, now behind the character as they walk past

entered.detail: tall street lamp illuminating the promenade path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the waterfront as dusk deepens into evening. The trash cans and sailboat pass out of view behind, while the bridge becomes more prominent. The character eventually moves toward the railing around 35 seconds, and by 48 seconds the camera has moved past them, revealing the continuing promenade ahead with street lamps and distant pedestrians walking.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a waterfront promenade as the warm glow of sunset deepens into a cool evening. It begins with the character walking past dual trash cans toward a fisherman standing by a metal railing, with the city skyline shimmering across the water. As the character continues forward, a colorful sailboat with yellow and red sails glides past from right to left while birds fly across a purple and orange sky and a large steel truss bridge emerges in the distance. The scene then shifts as the sailboat and fisherman recede behind the camera, allowing the bridge to become more prominent against the darkening horizon. Finally, the camera moves past the railing to reveal the continuing promenade ahead, illuminated by street lamps and populated by distant pedestrians.
